title: Shield Sounds Backport
description: A server-side mod adds shield breaking and blocking sounds, which are exactly the same as in Minecraft 1.21.5
body:
# What does this mod do?
In 1.21.5, Mojang fixed the long-existing [bug](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-255756) that shield blocking and breaking sounds are only heardable by the blocker. This mod brings back that fix to earlier Minecraft version.
# Install
- Download the version matches your mod loader. 
- Put the jar file in your .minecraft/mods folder.
- Please run with Fabric API if you are using Fabric loader.

__Note: This mod registers event listeners on the SERVER SIDE. Therefore, if the server already has the mod installed, the client installation is not required.__
